title: Light Tender American Fry Salad
description: A light and refreshing American dish featuring baby lettuce leaves, crispy fries, and halal-friendly chicken. This salad is perfect for those looking for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: Crumbled Feta Cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional for those looking for extra flavor

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) to cook the fries.
Cut the fries into 1/2 inch thick sticks and place them on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with halal-friendly oil and toss to coat.
Roast the fries in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy.
Grill the chicken breast to perfection.
Slice the chicken into thin strips.
In a large bowl, combine the baby lettuce leaves, diced onions, diced tomatoes, and crumbled feta cheese.
In a small bowl, whisk together the balsamic vinaigrette and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
Top the salad with the roasted fries and sliced chicken.
